description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. The front facade is defined by a prominent entryway, flanked by large rectangular windows and a small porch area with greenery. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage at the rear, and the landscaping incorporates neatly trimmed hedges and mature trees. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roofline is flat, with some sections featuring parapet walls and open terrace spaces. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a mix of light and dark finishes, large windows, a front porch, and a detached rear garage. The landscaping includes hedges and mature trees, emphasizing a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, front porch, and driveway with hedges and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and the driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detached garage, backyard area, and additional windows on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the continuation of the flat roof and window pattern.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, flanked by large rectangular windows and bordered by hedges and a tree.
